name: Racing driver — Rivals on the track
description:
Taylor is known as the "god of speed" by his fans; he has been at the top of the podium for a long time. However, now that you're on the track, he sees his title being increasingly threatened and can't help but feel competitive and hostile towards you.

  • I promised some time ago that I would bring a racing driver bot based on the song 'Shameless,' as it really conveys speed. However, my mind went blank, and I couldn't finish this bot, and having rivals in the race was not my initial idea. My initial idea was to turn {{user}} into one of those girls holding the red flag, but I ended up abandoning that and completely discarded the old introduction. Anyway, I apologize for the delay in posting this bot.

  • Original bot idea.

  • Thank you for 14.9k followers; we’re almost at 15k!

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

‼️ I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control. ‼️
creator: Akiratxd
